title: Trin Decor Pack - decorations to build with Immersive Vehicles
description: Adds urban furniture, garage equipment, shop furniture, and much more to minecraft!
body:
# Trin - The Trims Of Freedom

_Immersive Vehicles is a Minecraft mod that allows you to download vehicles pack (planes, cars, and much more)._

**Trin**, one of the _greatest_ fictional Immersive Vehicle brand is here to present to you it's inventory of decors, from modular greenhouses to interior furniture, along side technology and decoration, this pack will allow you to bring life to your cities and interiors. This independent pack doesn't have any dependency, making it optimal if you only need the decors without any vehicles nor parts!

  
_**NOTE: This pack doesn't add any parts nor vehicles**_

Trin being expending to all vehicular markets, **Trin** also has the chance to offer those packs:

- [Trin Parts Pack](https://modrinth.com/mod/trin-part-pack)
- [Trin Civil Pack V4](https://modrinth.com/mod/trin-civil-pack)
- [Trin Gramados Extension Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/trin-gramados-extension-pack)

_Feedback and bug reports are welcomed! You are more than welcomed to use Trin Packs through servers or mod packs._

  
You can have more and better info (like planned vehicles, games, a way to order custom liveries and more) in the [Discord](https://discord.gg/6rDJ3MR)
